query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN phone LIKE '+1%' THEN 'E.164 (+1...)'
    WHEN phone LIKE '1%' AND LENGTH(phone) = 11 THEN '11-digit (1...)'
    WHEN LENGTH(phone) = 10 THEN '10-digit (no country code)'
    WHEN phone LIKE '(%' THEN 'Formatted ((xxx)...)'
    ELSE CONCAT('Other (len=', LENGTH(phone), ')')
  END as phone_format,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM customers
WHERE phone IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(phone) >= 10
GROUP BY phone_format
ORDER BY count DESC;

    WHEN LENGTH(phone) = 10 THEN '10-digit (no country code)'
    WHEN phone LIKE '(%' THEN 'Formatted ((xxx)...)'
